name_en: M11563 Rose Purple This Speedy Bandoulière 40 Monogram Leather handbag features a soft grained calfskin leather wrapped sheepskin lining, presenting a hazy view of the canvas print through a printed Monogram pattern, expressing the new season creativity of Creative Director Pharrell Williams. 40 x 26 x 23 cm (Length x Height x Width)
